description: Comprehensive meta-monitoring dashboard for GCP Cloud Monitoring. Tracks uptime checks, alerting policies, metric ingestion costs, API usage, notification channels, SLO compliance, log-based metrics, and custom/agent metric health via Google Cloud Monitoring exporter.
title: GCP Cloud Monitoring

a9d50f71-6ce3-42fd-aa53-5ea04ca77401.name: project_id
a9d50f71-6ce3-42fd-aa53-5ea04ca77401.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'project_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name LIKE '%monitoring%'

dc3e8a60-ec57-4da0-b84b-d00189f1291f.name: service_name
dc3e8a60-ec57-4da0-b84b-d00189f1291f.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'service_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name LIKE '%monitoring%'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'project_id') = '{{.project_id}}'

widgets.description: Whether uptime checks passed (1=up, 0=down)
